title: BuldX Fast
description: A modpack for pure optimization of your game !
body:
---

# ⚡ BuldX Fast – Push Minecraft Beyond Limits 🚀

## 💨 What is BuldX Fast?

**BuldX Fast** is not just another optimization pack.
It’s a **pure performance experience** designed to make Minecraft **buttery-smooth, ultra-fast, and stable**—all while keeping the **true vanilla gameplay** you love.

Forget stutters. Forget slow worlds. With BuldX Fast, every frame, every chunk, every movement is optimized.

---

## 🔥 Why Choose BuldX Fast?

- ✅ **Insane FPS Boost** – From 100 → 600+ FPS depending on your setup.
- ✅ **Zero lag spikes** – Smooth chunk loading, no more freezes when exploring.
- ✅ **Shader-ready** – Play beautiful AND fast.
- ✅ **Instant startup & fast worlds** – Launch faster, load faster, play faster.
- ✅ **Lightweight** – No clutter, just performance.

---

## 📊 Performance Comparison (Example)

*(AMD RYZEN 7 3700X, 32 GB RAM, RTX 5060)*

- BuldX Fast >> 817.3 FPS
- Minecraft Vanilla >> 703.1 FPS
- Fabulously Optimized >> 670.9 FPS

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea65f90ffd66bcec3603054d727f9588d65ffbb4.png)

---

## 🛠 Features

### ⚡ Always Up-to-Date

BuldX Fast keeps up with new Minecraft versions quickly.

### 🔒 Stable & Safe

Only battle-tested optimization mods. Maximum stability, no crashes.

### 🎮 Easy Setup

Works with **Modrinth App**, **Prism**, **MultiMC**, or your favorite launcher.
No configs needed—install and enjoy.

---

## ❓ FAQ

>  Does it change gameplay?

No. 100% vanilla experience, only faster and smoother.

> Which mods are included?

Check the **Changelog** for a detailed list.

> Can I use it as a base for my modpack?

Yes, just credit BuldX Fast and link back to this page.

---

## 🙌 Support BuldX Fast

If you like the project, share it, star it!
